top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-17
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 is launching the Starlink Group 17-17, a batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm may produce auroras visible at latitudes above 65°.
top_events.action: Check conditions and prepare for possible aurora sightings.

top_events.title: Long March 2C/YZ-1S | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: China's Long March 2C/YZ-1S is set to launch with an unknown payload.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
